title: Corporate authority
doc_html:
§1113.  Corporate authority

A professional optometry corporation shall engage in no business other than the practice of optometry, but may hold property for investment or in connection with its optometry practice.  

Added by Acts 1980, No. 404, §1.
doc_text:
§1113.  Corporate authority
A professional optometry corporation shall engage in no business other than the practice of optometry, but may hold property for investment or in connection with its optometry practice.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 404, §1.
